revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: moving them to the second thousand
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects 1k to 2k]] second go using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects 1k to 2k]] }}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 1k to 2k]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] }}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bbb]] adding a dummy category again to make the cateroies show up using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:bbb]] }}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects second thousand]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:bbb]] }}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Confirmed wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:Tt]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|Category:Automatic_wikipedia_redirects_second_thousand]][[Category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:bbb]] [[Category:Tt]] }}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: remove any leading or trailing spaces from unnamed parameter 1 that would break URL
Set to check Wikidata property P2003

revision.text: [https://www.instagram.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2003|[[Category:Instagram template with no id set]]}}}}}}}}}}/ {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Instagram]]<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> [http://privateinstaviewer.com/ '''How To See Private Instagram Profile''']

revision.comment: Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
use [[Module:EditAtWikidata]] to add edit link if using Wikidata
Protected "[[Template:Instagram]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]; 2,000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
per all other social media templates
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update so testing for [[:Category:Instagram username different from Wikidata]] ignores upper/lower case differences between username in template and username in Wikidata. Tested first in [[/sandbox]].

revision.comment: remove any leading or trailing spaces from unnamed parameter 1 that would break URL
Set to check Wikidata property P2003

revision.text: [https://www.instagram.com/{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|{{#property:P2003|[[Category:Instagram template with no id set]]}}}}}}}}}}/ {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}}}}}] on [[Instagram]]<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> [http://privateinstaviewer.com/ '''How To See Private Instagram Profile''']

revision.comment: Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
use [[Module:EditAtWikidata]] to add edit link if using Wikidata
per all other social media templates
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

use [[Module:EditAtWikidata]] to add edit link if using Wikidata
Protected "[[Template:Instagram]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]; 2,000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
per all other social media templates
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update so testing for [[:Category:Instagram username different from Wikidata]] ignores upper/lower case differences between username in template and username in Wikidata. Tested first in [[/sandbox]].
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]] [[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2003}} | [https://www.instagram.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2003}}|sep=,}} }}/ {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Instagram (identifier)|Instagram]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2003|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2003|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Instagram username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Instagram|Instagram]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Instagram]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Instagram template missing ID and not in Wikidata]] [[Category:Pages using Instagram with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
